title: Factory Layout Distance Optimizer
description: Calculates the total material handling distance and identifies optimization opportunities based on facility layout, flow intensity, and path efficiency. Aligns with ISO 9001, Lean Manufacturing, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Number of Departments
inputs.businessContext: Total distinct production or storage areas in the facility.

inputs.label: Flow Intensity Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
inputs.businessContext: Number of material movements between each pair of departments per day.

inputs.label: Distance Matrix (triangular, comma-separated per row)
inputs.businessContext: Current or proposed travel distances between department centroids.

inputs.label: Path Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of straight-line distance to actual travel path (1.0 = perfect straight line).

inputs.label: Layout Type
inputs.businessContext: Classification of the facility layout according to standard industrial engineering taxonomy.

inputs.label: Use Weighted Distance (Flow × Distance)
inputs.businessContext: If true, the primary result is the sum of flow × distance; otherwise raw distance sum.

rules.message: Number of departments must match the dimensions of both matrices.
Both matrices must be symmetric (undirected flows/distances).
Path efficiency factor must be between 0.1 and 1.0.

thresholds.alert: Total weighted distance exceeds 50,000 meter-trips/day. Consider layout reconfiguration.
Path efficiency factor below 0.5 indicates significant travel waste. Review aisle and corridor design.
A single department pair has flow intensity > 1,000 trips/day. Investigate potential congestion.

formulas.label: Raw Distance Sum
formulas.description: Sum of all pairwise distances (lower triangle).

formulas.label: Flow-Distance Product Matrix
formulas.description: Element-wise multiplication of flow intensity and distance matrices (lower triangle).

formulas.label: Adjusted Total Distance
formulas.description: Total weighted distance divided by path efficiency factor to account for non-straight travel.

formulas.label: Average Distance per Trip
formulas.description: Adjusted total distance divided by total flow intensity.

formulas.label: Layout Efficiency Index
formulas.description: Ratio of theoretical minimum distance (if all flows were adjacent) to actual adjusted distance.

formulas.label: Primary Result: Total Material Handling Distance
formulas.description: If use_weighted_distance is true, returns adjusted_total_distance; else returns raw_distance_sum.
formulas.expression: IF use_weighted_distance THEN adjusted_total_distance ELSE raw_distance_sum

primary.label: Total Material Handling Distance
primary.description: Primary metric representing the total distance traveled by materials per day, adjusted for path efficiency.

adjusted_total_distance.description: Weighted distance adjusted for path efficiency.

average_distance_per_trip.description: Average travel distance per material movement.

layout_efficiency_index.description: Efficiency of current layout compared to theoretical optimum (1.0 = perfect).

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Long-Haul Department Pairs
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Pairs with distance > 80th percentile and flow > median. These contribute disproportionately to total distance.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inefficient Path Segments
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Segments where path_efficiency_factor < 0.6, indicating potential for aisle or conveyor redesign.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High-Flow Low-Proximity Pairs
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Pairs with flow in top 20% but distance in bottom 20% of possible distances (missed adjacency opportunity).

suggestedActions.label: Relocate High-Flow Pairs
suggestedActions.description: Move departments with highest flow-distance product to adjacent positions to reduce travel.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Aisle Design
suggestedActions.description: Redesign corridors or install conveyors for segments with path efficiency < 0.6.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Cellular Manufacturing
suggestedActions.description: For process layouts with low efficiency index, consider reorganizing into product-focused cells.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Non-Value-Added Movement
suggestedActions.description: Analyze and eliminate unnecessary material handling trips identified by hidden loss drivers.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Primary Result
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Primary result multiplied by a confidence factor (0.8 to 1.0) based on data completeness and accuracy.
